task: Show me the code for the company that is the top mover in the Cboe Europe Technology Sector Index (BEPTEC) as of the latest market close.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the Cboe Europe indices pages and opened the BEPTEC dashboard. The snapshot on the BEPTEC Summary tab showed TOP MOVERS with STMICROELECTRONICS ORD at +9.62%, the highest listed. The agent then opened the Constituents tab, where the table explicitly showed the Code column and the row for STMICROELECTRONICS ORD with code STMPAp and %+/- +9.62. This directly supports the final answer. Mentioning the venue-suffixed quote symbol STMPAp-CX is extra but not harmful; the requested company code shown on the page is STMPAp.
final_result_response:
The top mover in the Cboe Europe Technology Sector Index (BEPTEC) is **STMICROELECTRONICS ORD**.

**Code:** `STMPAp`  
Cboe quote symbol with venue suffix: `STMPAp-CX`

It was up **+9.62%** at the latest close shown on Cboe.
action_history: Opening Cboe homepage: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.cboe.com/');
Going to European equities section: await page.locator('e52').click();
Going to European equities section: await page.locator('e31').click();
Opening benchmark indices information: await page.locator('e97').click();
Opening BEPTEC index detail: await page.locator('e192').click();
Checking the constituents tab for displayed code format: await page.locator('e72').click();
